outlook.samburu: The eastern parts of Turkana and Samburu are expected to receive near- to below-normal rainfall.

advisory: Farmers should strengthen field drainage, unclog furrows, and avoid activities that compact already-wet soils.

temperature.normal_max_source: KMD long-term mean maximum temperature for Samburu County ASAL zone
temperature.extreme_max_source: Recorded extreme maximum temperature for northern Kenya ASAL counties
